mapper.select: SELECT CL_CODE, CL_CODE_NM, CL_CODE_DC, USE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM FROM COMTCCMMNCLCODE ORDER BY CL_CODE
SELECT CL_CODE, CL_CODE_NM, CL_CODE_DC, USE_AT, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM FROM COMTCCMMNCLCODE WHERE CL_CODE = #{_parameter} LIMIT 1
SELECT C.CODE_ID, C.CODE_ID_NM, C.CODE_ID_DC, C.USE_AT, C.CL_CODE, CL.CL_CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNCODE C LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNCLCODE CL ON C.CL_CODE = CL.CL_CODE ORDER BY C.CODE_ID
SELECT C.CODE_ID, C.CODE_ID_NM, C.CODE_ID_DC, C.USE_AT, C.CL_CODE, CL.CL_CODE_NM FROM COMTCCMMNCODE C LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNCLCODE CL ON C.CL_CODE = CL.CL_CODE WHERE C.CODE_ID = #{_parameter} LIMIT 1

select.if: SELECT CODE_ID, CODE, CODE_NM, CODE_DC, USE_AT FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = #{_parameter} ORDER BY CODE_ID, CODE
SELECT CODE_ID, CODE, CODE_NM, CODE_DC, USE_AT FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE ORDER BY CODE_ID, CODE

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMTCCMMNCODE WHERE CL_CODE = #{_parameter}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMTCCMMNCLCODE WHERE CL_CODE = #{_parameter}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMTCCMMNCODE WHERE CODE_ID = #{_parameter}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTCCMMNCLCODE SET CL_CODE_NM = #{clCodeNm}, CL_CODE_DC = #{clCodeDc}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{updaterId} WHERE CL_CODE = #{clCode}

UPDATE COMTCCMMNCODE SET CODE_ID_NM = #{codeIdNm}, CODE_ID_DC = #{codeIdDc}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, CL_CODE = #{clCode}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{updaterId} WHERE CODE_ID = #{codeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT D.CODE_ID, D.CODE, D.CODE_NM, D.CODE_DC, D.USE_AT, M.MENU_URL, M.MENU_ICON, SUBSTR(D.CODE, 1, 4) AS DOMAIN_CODE, DM.CODE_NM AS DOMAIN_NAME, DM.CODE_DC AS DOMAIN_NAME_EN FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE D INNER JOIN COMTNMENUINFO M ON D.CODE = M.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE DM ON DM.CODE_ID = D.CODE_ID AND DM.CODE = SUBSTR(D.CODE, 1, 4) WHERE D.CODE_ID = #{codeId} AND LENGTH(D.CODE) = 8
AND (LOWER(D.CODE) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(D.CODE_NM) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(D.CODE_DC) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchKeyword}) || '%')
AND LOWER(M.MENU_URL) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{searchUrl}) || '%'
ORDER BY D.CODE
mapper.update: UPDATE COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE SET CODE_NM = #{codeNm}, CODE_DC = #{codeDc}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{updaterId} WHERE CODE_ID = (SELECT CODE_ID FROM COMTCCMMNDETAILCODE WHERE CODE = #{code} LIMIT 1) AND CODE = #{code}
UPDATE COMTNMENUINFO SET MENU_NM = #{codeNm}, MENU_NM_EN = #{codeDc}, MENU_URL = #{menuUrl}, MENU_ICON = #{menuIcon}, USE_AT = #{useAt}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE MENU_CODE = #{code}
